narrative:
Hill 2-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,412 registered voters, with 51.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.9%, a modest Republican lean of 2.8 percentage points.
